title: Keyword Encryptor
description: This program can encrypt a file of any type with a given keyword. Once encrypted, the file appears to contain random data. It can be decrypted with the same keyword. This program is written in Rust and runs in the terminal.

title: Keyword Encryptor GUI
description: A graphical user interface for the Keyword Encryptor project. It is also written in the Rust language, and uses a graphical library called Iced.

title: Learning Management System
description: A learning management system application that was built in a group for my CS3750 class. The application uses ASP.NET and razor pages.

title: Python Web Scraper
description: This program is a web scraper built in python as a final project for my CS3030 class. The program scrapes information from Weber State's courses catalog and stores the information in a CSV file.

title: Turing Machine
description: This program simulates a Turing machine. It was written in C++ as a final project for my CS4110 class. The program reads from the .txt files in the repository, which contain instructions for the Turing machine.

title: Midi Translator
description: A program that maps inputs from a midi keyboard to regular keyboard inputs. It allows the user to make and customize profiles that contain keyboard mappings with a graphical user interface. This allows a user to play some video games with a midi controller.

title: Grant Management System
description: This is my CS4760 capstone project. It is an ASP.NET application that manages university grant applications.
